news.headline: Dwight Capital & Dwight Mortgage Trust finance $260.5MM in November with notable transactions including a $51.8MM HUD loan for Integra Isles Apartments.
news.summary: In Miami, Dwight Capital and its affiliate REIT, Dwight Mortgage Trust (DMT), finalized real estate financings totaling $260.5 million in November. Key deals comprised a HUD loan for Integra Isles Apartments, alongside bridge loans for Willow Creek Apartments and a trio of skilled nursing facilities. A significant transaction involved a $51.8 million HUD 221(d)(4) construction loan for the construction of Integra Isles, a forthcoming 264-unit market rate apartment complex.

news.headline: Cetera welcomes $231M AUA team to Summit Financial Networks in San Diego. Three members from Scottsdale join from MML Investors Services.
news.summary: A team of three financial professionals operating under the name allwealth Planning in Scottsdale has recently transitioned from MML Investors Services to join Cetera Financial Group in San Diego. This move transpired on December 11, 2024. Cetera Financial Group, known as the leading financial advisor Wealth Hub, welcomed the three-member team to its platform.

news.headline: Oomnitza enhances IT Asset Management platform with new features to maximize efficiency, ensure security, and unlock profitability.
news.summary: A modern IT Asset Management platform called Oomnitza, based in San Francisco, unveiled new features on December 11, 2024. These features aim to boost business efficiency, enhance information security, and drive profitability through technology asset management. The updates promise to deliver measurable value to businesses by optimizing processes.

news.headline: Gale and ConnectEDD Publishing partner to offer Jimmy Casas' PD resources on Gale eBooks platform, providing school districts nationwide with 24/7 access for educational excellence.
news.summary: Casas' renowned professional learning resources will now be available to school districts across the country at all times, following a recent collaboration between Gale, a Cengage Group company, and ConnectEDD Publishing. This partnership, announced on December 11, 2024, will provide access to educational excellence tools for educators to enhance learning experiences.

news.headline: Therme Group buys Therme Erding, secures €320M financing to create largest wellbeing platform in the world.
news.summary: Therme Group recently acquired Europe's biggest wellbeing destination, Therme Erding, situated near Munich. This acquisition was supported by one of the largest single-asset financings in the industry. The announcement was made in London on December 11, 2024. Therme Erding is considered a milestone in the wellness industry, offering a wide range of services and facilities to visitors. This strategic move by Therme Group reflects their commitment to expanding their presence in the global wellness market.

news.headline: Health-E Commerce® partners with Rex MD® to offer telehealth services for men's health on FSA Store® and HSA Store® to address erectile dysfunction.
news.summary: In Dallas on December 11, 2024, a recent partnership was announced to offer discreet and easily accessible telehealth services targeting erectile dysfunction in men. This collaboration aims to address the reluctance many men face in seeking help for their sexual health concerns, which can significantly impact their overall well-being. By leveraging telehealth solutions, the initiative provides confidential support to individuals, delivering vital services to potentially improve both their physical and mental health.

news.headline: MASA's report reveals a 32% increase in emergency transportation costs in the last four years, impacting Americans.
news.summary: Over the last four years, expenses have surged by 32%, largely due to prevalent health issues in the United States. MASA®, a prominent emergency transportation insurance firm serving the U.S. and 14 other countries, disclosed this information. The rise in costs is significant, underscoring the financial burden faced by Americans when it comes to healthcare.

news.headline: Made4net's WMS solutions recognized in 2024 Gartner Midmarket Context: Magic Quadrant report, setting industry standards.
news.summary: A renowned global firm specializing in Warehouse Management Systems (WMS) and supply chain execution software, Made4net, based in Teaneck, NJ, made significant strides in setting industry benchmarks as per the latest announcement on Dec 11, 2024. The company continues to lead the sector with remarkable accomplishments, showcasing its expertise and innovation in delivering top-notch WMS solutions worldwide.

news.headline: Inflation accelerates slightly, but signs point to moderation. Fed to decide on rates for 2024 next week.
news.summary: The rate of inflation accelerated in the previous month; however, a deeper analysis indicates a potential slowdown in the future. The Federal Reserve is set to announce its last rate decision for the year 2024 in the upcoming week.

news.headline: Vultr partners with AMD, Broadcom, and Juniper Networks to revolutionize GPU data center architecture in four-way collaboration.
news.summary: Vultr has unveiled a partnership with Juniper Networks, Broadcom Inc., and AMD in West Palm Beach, Florida. This four-way strategic collaboration is set to revolutionize the tech industry.

news.headline: Copy.ai's GTM AI platform revenue grew 480% in 2024; Enterprise companies shifting to single AI platform.
news.summary: In San Francisco, Copy.ai's Go-To-Market AI platform witnessed an impressive 480% revenue increase in 2024. This growth can be attributed to enterprise companies opting to swap out disparate AI tools for a unified GTM AI platform.

news.headline: TAP Network releases 2024 Diversity in Tech Dashboard in Canada, marking fifth annual report on sector's progress.
news.summary: The 2024 Diversity in Tech Dashboard was unveiled by TAP Network in Vancouver, British Columbia. This marks the fifth consecutive year the organization has published this report, focusing on diversity within Canada's tech industry. The report highlights important statistics and trends in the sector, providing valuable insights for stakeholders.

news.headline: EnCharge AI CEO Dr. Naveen Verma awarded 2024 Edison Patent Award for Computing Innovation. Ceremony held on Nov 21, 2024 in NJ.
news.summary: The CEO of EnCharge AI, Dr. Naveen Verma, was awarded the 2024 Edison Patent Award in Computing Technology by the Research & Development Council of New Jersey for their groundbreaking "Configurable In-Memory Computing Engine" patent. This award, the highest recognition of innovation in the state, was presented during a ceremony on November 21, 2024, at Bell Works in Holmdel, NJ. Dr. Verma's core technology has been pivotal in EnCharge AI's advancements.

news.headline: Navitus partners with Learn to Live to provide mental health solutions; offers CBT services to clients, aiding in managing health costs for members.
news.summary: In Madison, Wisconsin, Navitus Health Solutions has revealed a collaboration with Learn to Live, introducing Learn to Live’s advanced digital cognitive behavioral therapy (CBT) and clinician coaching platform to Navitus clients. This partnership aims to enhance current and upcoming offerings for aiding payers in controlling health expenses for their members by expanding the availability of proven mental health services. Statistics show that nearly 50% of Americans will require mental health support.

news.headline: SentinelOne excels in 2024 MITRE ATT&CK® Evaluations: Enterprise with 100% detection and 88% fewer alerts than median.
news.summary: A recent evaluation by MITRE ATT&CK® in 2024 has revealed that SentinelOne® (NYSE: S) based in Mountain View, Calif., continues to lead in detecting advanced threats. The AI-powered Singularity™ Platform by SentinelOne achieved a perfect 100% detection rate and zero delays in detecting 80 out of 80 attacks across every stage in the evaluation. This marks the fifth consecutive year that SentinelOne has excelled in this third-party assessment, setting a high standard in threat detection capabilities.

news.headline: Cybernet Evolution accomplished 100% client password management adoption with Bitwarden partnership.
news.summary: Bitwarden, a renowned provider of password and key management solutions, has disclosed a successful collaboration with Cybernet Evolution, an MSP based in Australia. The partnership has led to almost complete adoption of password management tools by clients, totaling nearly 100%. Cybernet Evolution, operating within various sectors including healthcare, education, and automotive, leverages the Bitwarden partner program to provide cutting-edge security services. This initiative highlights the increasing demand for robust security solutions in diverse industries.

news.headline: Mindset Medical's contactless pulse rate device, IVC App, cleared by FDA with Series A financing.
news.summary: In Phoenix, Mindset Medical, Inc. has received FDA 510(k) clearance for its contactless pulse rate measurement device, the Informed Vital Core (IVC) App. This marks the company's first FDA clearance and comes after securing Series A financing on June 6, 2024. The clearance for the IVC App is notable as it permits healthcare providers to gather pulse rate physiological measurements.

news.headline: Energy Hire partners with American Association of Professional Landmen to offer AI-driven hiring platform to AAPL members.
news.summary: In Fort Worth, Texas, Energy Hire, a prominent AI-powered hiring platform for the energy industry, has partnered with the American Association of Professional Landmen (AAPL), a top association for energy professionals. This collaboration introduces a new service for AAPL members, integrating Energy Hire's advanced technology into AAPL's website. The partnership aims to offer members an exclusive and efficient hiring platform tailored to their industry.

news.headline: Digital World Class® HR teams double tech investment, serving 65% more employees per HR staff, reducing labor costs.
news.summary: In Miami, recent research from The Hackett Group, Inc. (NASDAQ: HCKT) showcases the success of Digital World Class® HR organizations. Their efficiency enhancements and tech investments have led to lower labor expenses, higher productivity, and a solid base for leveraging generative artificial intelligence (Gen AI) in HR. This progress indicates improved leadership and a positive outlook for the integration of Gen AI in HR functions, aiming to boost efficiency further.

news.headline: eGrowcery partners with Forage to enable EBT SNAP payments for grocery retailers, enhancing payment options for shoppers.
news.summary: A company based in San Francisco and Bloomfield Hills, Michigan, eGrowcery, is expanding its range of products to meet the needs of retailers better and provide more payment options for customers.

news.headline: Nov CPI report may steer Fed rate cut in Dec; S&P 500 up. Core inflation sticky but rate cut likely. Fed anticipated to cut rates on Dec. 18.
news.summary: Market analysts anticipate a Federal Reserve rate reduction on Dec. 18, with the possibility of a hawkish stance for the upcoming year following the release of the November Consumer Price Index (CPI) inflation report. The report indicates that while core inflation remains unchanged, a rate cut by the Fed is highly likely. Along with this news, the S&P 500 index has experienced a rise.

news.headline: Swingline reveals new line of Optima Electric Staplers, boasting 5 innovative models for enhanced efficiency and precision.
news.summary: In Lake Zurich, Illinois, Swingline®, a top brand in workspace tools for almost a century, has unveiled an updated range of its renowned Optima® Electric Staplers. This new series aims to boost efficiency and accuracy, offering reliable, high-performance devices suitable for personal workstations and commercial settings. The enhanced Swingline® Optima® series includes five new models, catering to a variety of needs.

news.headline: Interactive Brokers introduces AI-generated news summaries for faster investment decisions, Nasdaq: IBKR.
news.summary: Interactive Brokers, a leading financial services company trading on Nasdaq under the symbol IBKR, has revealed the launch of AI-generated news summaries as part of its News & Research service. This advancement aims to enhance the user experience by providing concise and insightful updates on market trends and developments. Investors can now access automated news summaries for efficient decision-making.

news.headline: GroupBy partners with adCAPTCHA to enhance eCommerce security, aiming to combat bots accounting for 50% global web traffic.
news.summary: In Toronto, GroupBy Inc., a prominent player in SaaS-based eCommerce search and product discovery, has unveiled a key collaboration with adCAPTCHA, an innovative security verification platform. The partnership intends to enhance digital customer journeys by integrating strong security protocols with tailored product discovery during shopping. With bots representing 50% of worldwide web traffic, these entities aim to tackle this substantial threat to eCommerce, a menace that results in losses totaling millions of dollars.

news.headline: AI-driven breast cancer research abstracts by iCAD presented at SABCS 2024 show improved detection, risk prediction across diverse populations. Study on Breast Arterial Calcifications (BAC) identified a higher prevalence in women with mammographically detected breast cancer. Full article on Benzinga.com.
news.summary: iCAD, Inc. announced that four AI-driven breast cancer research abstracts have been accepted for presentation at the 2024 San Antonio Breast Cancer Symposium. The abstracts aim to improve detection and risk prediction accuracy in breast health AI and address disparities in diverse populations. The research includes a 10-year image-derived AI-risk model showing higher discriminatory performance than the clinical Tyrer-Cuzick v8 risk model. The ProFound AI Breast Health Suite plays a critical role in early cancer detection and risk prediction. The studies highlight the transformative potential of AI in improving outcomes for all demographics, with one abstract showcasing an AI algorithm identifying Breast Arterial Calcifications (BAC) in screening mammograms based on race, age, and cancer status. The study suggests that BAC could serve as an effective cardiovascular biomarker across racial groups and highlights a higher prevalence of BAC in women with mammographically detected breast cancer. AI technology is seen as key to improving patient outcomes and driving growth in healthcare markets.

news.headline: Pickleball pro Parris Todd signs partnership with Franklin Sports, enhancing their roster for future.
news.summary: In a recent report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to 4%, the lowest it has been in the past five years. The number of new jobs created last month reached a total of 250,000, exceeding expectations of economists. Additionally, the stock market saw a significant increase, with the main index rising by 2.5% in response to the positive economic news. Experts attribute these improvements to a boost in consumer spending and confidence in the market. The government has also announced plans to further stimulate the economy through investments in infrastructure and small businesses. Despite these positive developments, concerns remain regarding inflation rates and the ongoing global trade tensions. Overall, the outlook for the country's economy appears promising, with indications of continued growth and stability.

news.headline: Omega Healthcare recognized as a "Leader" in Revenue Cycle Management by Everest Group, reflecting innovation and global expansion.
news.summary: On December 11, 2024, Omega Healthcare, based in Boca Raton, Florida, was acknowledged as a "Leader" in the Revenue Cycle. This recognition was due to their advanced technology innovations, successful partnership approach, and increase in global operations. Omega Healthcare's exceptional performance and strategic initiatives have set them apart in the industry. This achievement underscores their commitment to growth and excellence.

news.headline: Nebraska Athletics launches Together We Win campaign, a five-day drive starting Dec. 16 to raise awareness and contributions.
news.summary: Lincoln, Nebraska - On December 11, 2024, the 1890 Nebraska initiative, the official NIL collective of Nebraska Athletics, revealed the launch of the Together We Win campaign. This event will span five days, starting on Monday, December 16, and ending on Friday, December 20...

news.headline: Global immersion cooling for EV batteries market to reach $278.45M by 2031, led by tech giants like Ricardo Plc, Mahle GmbH, Exoes SAS.
news.summary: The market for global immersion cooling technology for electric vehicle (EV) batteries is poised for rapid growth, with estimations pointing towards a significant increase to $278.45 million by the year 2031. This impressive advancement is fueled by the rising need for high-capacity batteries to enhance the driving range of EVs, as well as the increasing demand for electric vehicles in general.

news.headline: CRO services market to hit $188.54 billion by 2030 with 12.6% CAGR growth due to outsourcing trend in biotech/pharma.
news.summary: In Lewes, Delaware on December 11, 2024, it was reported that the CRO Services Market is experiencing significant growth due to the growing trend of pharmaceutical and biotechnology companies subcontracting research and development activities. Contract Research Organizations (CROs) are providing services such as conducting clinical trials, offering regulatory support, and managing data. This trend is driven by the need for specialized expertise and cost-efficiency in the industry. The market is witnessing substantial expansion with a noticeable increase in the outsourcing of research activities.

news.headline: Purfresh Clean launches innovative "SPACE" product to eliminate rat and mice problems in restaurants, ensuring rodent-free environments.
news.summary: In Hayward, California, on December 11, 2024, Purfresh Clean Inc., a startup, introduced innovative equipment technology targeting restaurants seeking to maintain rodent, odor, and bacteria-free environments. The newly launched "SPACE" system, developed by Purfresh Clean, integrates Ozone-Artificial Intelligence (O3-AI)...

news.headline: Global Hostile Vehicle Mitigation Device Market dominated by 70% share of permanent solutions. Various segments include temporary, semi-permanent, and permanent types._ASTCHARS
news.summary: The market for Hostile Vehicle Mitigation Devices is categorized by type into Temporary, Semi-permanent, and Permanent types, and by application into Aerodromes, Offices, and Shopping Centers. In Bangalore, India, news from December 11, 2024 reveals that the worldwide Hostile Vehicle Mitigation Device Market had a value of USD (insert value) at that time.

news.headline: Global Cybersecurity Certification Market expected to reach $8,033.5 million by 2030 at 12.4% CAGR - MarketsandMarkets™.
news.summary: A recent report indicates that the Cybersecurity Certification Market, based in DELRAY BEACH, Fla., is expected to increase significantly in the coming years. Starting at USD 3,987.6 million in 2024, the market is estimated to reach USD 8,033.5 million by 2030. This growth represents a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 12.4% over the forecast period.

news.headline: Origami Sake launches ZERO, 1st non-alcoholic sake in the US, made in Arkansas with 100% locally sourced ingredients.
news.summary: Originating from the heart of U.S. rice country, Origami Sake creates its signature beverages utilizing 100% locally sourced ingredients. Situated in Hot Springs, Arkansas, the pioneering American sake brewery proudly introduces ZERO, the nation's premier non-alcoholic sake. This groundbreaking product is officially launched on December 11, 2024, offering consumers across the country a unique option for an alcohol-free sake experience.

news.headline: 2024 AssemblyAI Hackathon in NYC features impressive Speech AI projects, highlighting creativity. Check out the winners!
news.summary: In New York City, the 2024 AssemblyAI Hackathon exhibited revolutionary Speech AI projects that demonstrated innovative applications of AssemblyAI's technology. The event featured impressive projects that showcased the potential of speech AI tools. Explore the winning projects and their significant impact on the industry. Check out more details on this groundbreaking event.

news.headline: Blushington expanding with two franchise locations in Houston, Texas, marks national growth with second and third locations.
news.summary: Blushington, a luxury beauty franchise offering A-List services for all customers, has revealed their expansion into the Texas market. This development includes the sale of their second and third franchise locations in Houston, marking a key achievement in their nationwide growth. These new locations will be overseen by franchisee Courtney Freels, a Houston local dedicated to providing accessible luxury services to the community.

news.headline: Vera Bradley's Q3 sales dropped 30%, revenue at $80.58M, stock slips. Initiating change in business model.
news.summary: Shares of Vera Bradley, Inc. (NASDAQ:VRA) saw a decline in trading on Wednesday following the release of their third-quarter financial results. The company reported net sales of $80.58 million for the quarter, marking a significant decrease of almost 30% compared to the previous year. CEO Jackie Ardrey acknowledged the challenges faced during this period, attributing them to the ongoing implementation of 'Project Restoration' aimed at overhauling the business model and repositioning the Vera Bradley brand. The Vera Bradley Direct segment generated revenues of $52.5 million, representing a 27.4% decline year over year. Comparable sales also took a hit, dropping by 27.2% in the third quarter.

news.headline: iQIYI (NASDAQ:IQ) introduces 'Extra Large Font' feature on app for improved accessibility to cater to senior users and others with visual needs.
news.summary: Shares of iQIYI, Inc. (NASDAQ: IQ) are up in premarket trading on Monday following the announcement of the new 'Extra Large Font' feature on their app. This feature aims to improve accessibility for senior users and individuals with visual impairments. The enhanced font size options now include the 'Extra Large Font', allowing for larger text sizes to cater to various visual needs. Users can easily adjust the interface and functionality of the app with a single click, offering a more user-friendly entertainment experience. The activation of this feature includes important accessibility enhancements.

news.headline: SABCS 2024: iCAD's AI study finds higher BAC prevalence in breast cancer patients, indicating potential for cardiovascular assessment alongside cancer treatment.
news.summary: A recent study found that breast arterial calcifications (BAC) are more common in breast cancer patients, with a prevalence rate of over 70%. This indicates a potential link between BAC and breast cancer. The study suggests the importance of conducting cardiovascular assessments alongside cancer treatment. These findings emphasize the need for comprehensive care that addresses both oncological and cardiovascular concerns in breast cancer patients.

news.headline: U.S. birthrates are declining with up to 25% of women facing fertility challenges. Female-led startup Lushi aims to transform options for conception. President-Elect Donald J. Trump has promised to expand.
news.summary: In New York, a women-led start-up named Lushi is set to revolutionize the fertility industry by offering tailored treatments, clinics, and wellness platforms for the up to 25% of reproductive-aged women in the U.S. facing fertility issues. This move aims to address the challenges presented by the industry's outdated, male-dominated structure. Scheduled for launch in December, Lushi's initiative comes amidst promises from President-Elect Donald J. Trump to enhance accessible reproductive options for women.

news.headline: AST SpaceMobile and Vodafone sign a long-term deal until 2034 to provide space-based cellular broadband, marking progress in global coverage expansion.
news.summary: Shares of AST SpaceMobile, Inc. (NASDAQ: ASTS) are up in premarket trading today following the announcement of a long-term commercial agreement with Vodafone Group Plc (NASDAQ: VOD) that extends until 2034. This collaboration is a major step forward in their mission to enhance worldwide broadband access. The deal outlines Vodafone's role in offering cellular broadband connectivity via satellite in its main regions and to other telecom companies via its Partner Markets initiative. Vodafone has been a crucial investor and technological collaborator with AST SpaceMobile since 2018.

news.headline: Check Point's Infinity XDR/XPR achieved 100% detection rate in 2024 MITRE ATT&CK evaluations, pioneering in threat protection.
news.summary: The latest security solution, Check Point Infinity XDR/XPR, offers unparalleled defense against ransomware and threats targeting endpoints. Combining cutting-edge technology, it provides protection like never before, ensuring safeguarding against cyberattacks. This solution presents a significant advancement in cybersecurity, with robust features to combat increasing risks. Check Point Infinity XDR/XPR is designed to shield against evolving threats in the digital landscape.

news.headline: Lee Enterprises (NASDAQ: LEE) to announce earnings of $0.65 per share on 12/12/2024. Investors eagerly await the news.
news.summary: Lee Enterprises (NASDAQ:LEE) is set to reveal its quarterly earnings on Thursday, December 12, 2024. Analysts predict the company will report an earnings per share (EPS) of $0.65. The announcement is highly anticipated by investors who are looking for updates. For further details, the complete story can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Blackrock, Inc. holds significant interests in Endeavour Mining plc as of December 10, 2024, per notification on December 11, 2024.
news.summary: Endeavour Mining plc has reported receiving a notification from Blackrock, Inc. on December 11, 2024, regarding their stake in the company as of the previous day, December 10, 2024.

news.headline: Experienced Dave Stair joins insured.io as Director of Sales, bringing 20+ years in insurance; worked for FRISS and One Inc.
news.summary: A highly experienced sales expert with over 20 years of proven success in Workers' Compensation, Commercial, and P&C Insurance markets has been appointed to head insured.io's national sales team. They previously held key roles at leading industry entities such as FRISS, One Inc., and DataPath SACRAMENTO.

news.headline: Data Link Solutions receives up to $1 billion from the U.S. Navy for MIDS JTRS modernization to enhance battlefield communication.
news.summary: Cutting-edge tactical radio technology is set to revolutionize battlefield awareness and mission success. Recently, the U.S. Navy granted an indefinite delivery contract to Data Link Solutions (a collaboration between BAE Systems and Collins Aerospace). This development, announced on December 11, 2024, is geared towards improving the tactical communication systems. This strategic partnership aims to increase situational awareness and enhance mission effectiveness on the battlefield.

news.headline: Power Sustainable's food private equity strategy for 2024 is successful with final closing of inaugural Fund in North American companies.
news.summary: In December 11, 2024, Power Sustainable has achieved a prosperous year with its food private equity strategy, Power Sustainable Lios (PSL). The company celebrated the successful final closing of its first Fund dedicated to investing in North American mid-market companies that support sustainable food production. This accomplishment marks a significant milestone for PSL in 2024.

news.headline: HSG Laser introduces T2V2.0 Three-Chuck Tube Fiber Laser Cutting Machine in Chicago, Dec. 11, 2024 - redefining precision cutting.
news.summary: In Chicago, on December 11, 2024, HSG Laser introduced the T2V2.0 Three-Chuck Tube Fiber Laser Cutting Machine. This machine is designed to provide accurate and efficient tube processing. The T2V2.0 is a versatile and innovative solution that sets new standards in accuracy and productivity.

news.headline: College students face stress & anxiety due to mental health & financial challenges. TimelyCare survey shows concerns.
news.summary: A new survey conducted by TimelyCare, a leading virtual health and well-being provider in higher education, has brought attention to the prevalent mental health and financial struggles facing college and university students. Released in FORT WORTH, Texas on December 11, 2024, the survey sheds light on the significant challenges impacting students. The results indicate that a substantial number of students are grappling with mental health issues, as well as facing financial hardships. TimelyCare's survey underscores the pressing need for additional support and resources to address these critical issues among college and university students.

news.headline: US hospitals see lower clinician turnover as pay and benefits improve, according to Aon's report. 7% decrease reported.
news.summary: In a recent report from Aon plc, it was revealed that an increasing number of U.S. hospitals have experienced either stable or decreased employee turnover rates. This positive trend comes as a result of hospitals enhancing their compensation packages and benefits to better attract and retain skilled professionals. The findings were based on data from Aon's 19th annual Benefits Survey of Hospitals. Notably, it was highlighted that seven percent of hospitals are seeing improvements in this area, reflecting the effectiveness of investing in competitive pay and incentives to drive staff retention.
